chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-3593 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For haring of main case. 10.09.2025 Syed Zaeem Hyder, advocate for the respondent. ------------- This is an old petition of 2023. It was last fixed on 18.02.2025, which is approximately 07 months ago when none was present for the petitioner without intimation. Today, once again petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that petitioner has lost interest to pursue this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
